name: Croutons
recipeIngredient: Bread, leftover, slightly stale, crusts trimmed and cut into 3/4 inch slices
Olive oil or garlic oil or chili oil of your choice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the bread into 3/4 x 3/4 inch cubes.
2. In a large skillet or frying pan, heat 1/4 cup oil over medium heat.
3. Add enough bread cubes to cover the bottom of the pan, but do not crowd them.
4. Toss the cubes in the hot oil using a slotted spoon, turning them so all sides cook.
5. Cook for about 10 minutes or until brown and crisp. If more oil is needed, add it and repeat steps 2-4 until all cubes are cooked.
6. Season with salt, pepper, and other desired spices.
7. Alternatively, pour 1/3 cup oil onto the bottom of a shallow roasting pan, add the bread cubes, and toss well.
8. Bake at 450°F (230°C) for about 15 minutes, turning the cubes several times with a slotted spoon.
9. Drain on paper towels and season with salt, pepper, and other desired spices.
Typed by Roberta Thompson
